chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D- 1328 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For order on Stay application 3. For hearing of main case 12.8.2025 Mr.Muhammad Rahim, Advocate a/w Petitioners Mr.Kewal Kumar, Advocate for respondent No.5 Mr.Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh a/w Insp. Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP, Hyderabad ********** Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed a copy of the statement of Petitioner No.1 (Bisma), recorded under Section 164, Cr.P.C., before the Court of Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-II, Tando Allahyar, which is also taken on record. In her statement, she has categorically deposed that her family members have lodged a false FIR. She has further stated that, after embracing Islam, she entered into marriage with Petitioner No.2 of her own free will, without any coercion or compulsion. The I.O present in Court states that the statement under Section 164 Cr.P.C of Petitioner No.1 will be duly considered, and upon proper investigation, a final report under Section 173 Cr.P.C. will be submitted before the concerned Magistrate for an appropriate order. Accordingly, the present petition stands disposed of along with listed application. The official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners when they approach to them. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
